params.name: Guiguzi Descends the Mountain
params.description: Guiguzi Descends the Mountain is a national first-class cultural relic and one of the only eight pieces of Yuan Dynasty blue-and-white character story porcelain left in the world. The body is painted with a picture of Guigu descending the mountain. In this blue and white painting, soldiers lead the way, tigers and leopards pull two wheeled carts, and Guigu sits on the cart. The immortal style and bones of the road are elegant and ethereal, and the porcelain craftsmen's every stroke and stroke ou …
